case_title: STEPHEN CORNISH VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CORNISH, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORNISH, STEPHEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-29-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING IS ORDERED TO APPEAR THROUGH A REPRESENTATIVE FAMILIAR WITH PLAINTIFF'S UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE NO. 624719. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNISH, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA THE COURT NOTES THAT THERE IS NO WRITTEN AGREEMENT IN EVIDENCE WHICH OBLIGATED DEFENDANT TO SECURE SUBSTITUTE HOUSING FOR PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-10-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
